title: Sprint Task Manifest
description: Defines the tasks, dependencies, and metadata for a sprint. Used by the generate-playbook script to produce a deterministic playbook.md.

sprintName.description: Human-readable sprint name (e.g., 'Event Discovery & Social Features').

protocolVersion.description: The version of agent-protocols used to generate this manifest (e.g., '4.3.0').

summary.description: A 2-3 sentence summary of the sprint's goals, features, and business value.

tasks.description: A flat array of all tasks in the sprint. The script uses dependsOn to compute the execution graph.

dependsOn.description: Array of task id strings this task depends on. Include ONLY direct, immediate dependencies. Do NOT include transitive dependencies (e.g. if C depends on B, and B depends on A, C's dependsOn should only include B). Empty array means no dependencies (eligible for concurrent execution).

skills.description: Array of skill paths relative to .agents/skills/ (e.g., 'platform/cloudflare-workers').

model.description: The model name string from models.json (e.g., 'Claude Opus 4.6 (Thinking)').

secondaryModel.description: The fallback model name string from models.json (e.g., 'Gemini 3.1 Pro (High)'). Used if the user faces token limits.

focusAreas.description: Soft declarations of architectural boundaries or core files this task intends to modify (e.g. ['schema.ts', 'Auth Context']). Used during planning to prevent severe structural conflicts by forcing dependency edges.

instructions.description: Detailed, multi-line task instructions. MUST use '\n- ' for bulleted formatting and line breaks to ensure readability. Optional for bookend tasks (isQA, isCodeReview, isRetro) — the script auto-injects workflow delegation commands and ignores any value provided here.

scope.description: Optional workspace scope hint (e.g., '@repo/api', '@repo/web'). Tasks sharing a scope at the same concurrency layer are grouped into one Chat Session.

estimatedFiles.description: Approximate number of files this task will create or modify. Used by the complexity estimator to determine if the task should be auto-split into sub-steps for more reliable agent execution.

scope.description: Optional scope override for this sub-step.

substeps.description: Optional pre-decomposed sub-steps. If provided and the task's complexity score exceeds the threshold, the task is automatically split into sequentially-chained sub-tasks for safer execution.

isIntegration.description: If true, the script injects the sprint-integration workflow delegation, acting as a merge step for feature branches before QA.

isQA.description: If true, the script injects the sprint-testing workflow delegation instead of custom instructions.

isCodeReview.description: If true, the script injects the sprint-code-review workflow delegation.

isRetro.description: If true, the script injects the sprint-retro workflow delegation.

isCloseSprint.description: If true, the script injects the close-sprint workflow delegation as the terminal bookend step that merges to main.

requires_approval.description: If true, the agent MUST pause and wait for explicit human-in-the-loop (HITL) approval before executing the task.
